info.title: dotnet-sdk
info.description: Manage the .NET SDK versions you have installed and get new ones, all with a dotnet CLI tool.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String))

commands.name: set
commands.description: Creates a global.json to switch to the specified .NET Core SDK version

options.name: --available
options.description: List SDKs available to download; default is to list installed SDKs.

options.name: --release-type
options.description: Show available versions matching the specified release types.

options.name: --support-phase
options.description: Show available versions matching the specified support phases.

options.name: --all
options.description: Show all available versions including all support phases and release types.

arguments.name: Filter
arguments.description: Filters list to only SDKs starting with the provided string.

commands.name: download
commands.description: Downloads the provided release version & platform.

options.name: --runtime
options.description: Indicate the version specified is the runtime version, NOT the SDK version.

options.name: --platform
options.description: The platform to download for. Defaults to the current platform on Windows and MacOS.

options.name: --no-hash-validation
options.description: Indicate that validation of hash should NOT be done.
